job_scores.reasoning: Excellent fit — candidate shipped production AI agents at Burnt (YC S25) using Claude Sonnet+Haiku, RAG, and prompt engineering; owns internshipmatcher.com with dual-model Claude pipeline. Direct AI application development experience.

Decent match — candidate has strong algorithms/data structures foundation and production Python+React work at Burnt and SJSU, but role is generic SDE with no specific stack mentioned to validate deeper fit.
Poor fit — role requires iOS/Swift development; resume shows only React/Python/FastAPI work with zero mobile, Swift, or iOS experience across all projects and internships.
Poor fit — role requires iOS development; candidate has no Swift, Objective-C, or mobile experience. All projects are web-based (React, FastAPI, TypeScript).

Excellent fit — candidate built AI agents at Burnt (Claude, RAG, 1,000+ production orders) and internshipmatcher.com (dual-model Claude pipeline); San Jose location matches. AI-native role aligns with LLM application work.

Decent match — candidate has strong CS fundamentals and production experience at Burnt and SJSU, but Apple's generic SDE role lacks specific stack details to confirm alignment beyond general programming.

Excellent fit — candidate shipped full-stack React+Python apps at Burnt (YC S25) and owns internshipmatcher.com (React+TypeScript frontend, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL). Exact stack match for full-stack role.

Strong fit — candidate has production full-stack experience at Burnt (React+Python) and SJSU (TypeScript+React+Node.js), plus internshipmatcher.com (React+FastAPI+PostgreSQL). Matches full-stack requirements well.
